instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.
input: Recruit a registered nurse for Engineering: screen applicants, schedule interviews, gather feedback, and send an offer to the chosen candidate.
output: {"workflow_name": "Registered Nurse Recruiting Pipeline", "category": "recruiting", "trigger": {"event": "A registered nurse requisition opens in Engineering", "source_system": "Lever"}, "systems": ["Lever", "Microsoft 365", "Slack", "Workday"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Screen new applications against the rubric", "system": "Lever", "required_inputs": ["job_id", "applications"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Auto-reject clear non-matches with a polite email"}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Schedule interview loop with the panel", "system": "Microsoft 365", "required_inputs": ["candidate_id", "panel_ids"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Collect structured feedback and decide", "system": "Lever", "required_inputs": ["candidate_id", "scorecards"], "condition": "Advance only if average score clears the bar", "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Generate and send the offer", "system": "Workday", "required_inputs": ["candidate_id", "compensation"], "condition": "Only after approval", "fallback": null}], "approval_required": true, "risk_level": "medium"}

instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.
input: At a healthcare provider we run the annual SOC 2 review over the data-handling controls in Jira: open it, gather evidence from owners, flag gaps and create remediation, then archive the attestation in DocuSign.
output: {"workflow_name": "SOC 2 Control Review", "category": "compliance", "trigger": {"event": "The SOC 2 review cycle begins", "source_system": "Jira"}, "systems": ["Jira", "DocuSign"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Open the periodic SOC 2 review", "system": "Jira", "required_inputs": ["control_set", "review_period"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Collect evidence from control owners", "system": "Jira", "required_inputs": ["control_ids", "owner_ids"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Send reminders and escalate overdue items"}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Review evidence and flag gaps", "system": "Jira", "required_inputs": ["evidence_ids"], "condition": "Create remediation tasks for any failing control", "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Archive the signed attestation", "system": "DocuSign", "required_inputs": ["report_id", "approver_id"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}], "approval_required": true, "risk_level": "high"}

instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.
input: Set up the access-request workflow for the AWS console. Capture justification, approve, grant time-bound access, and record it.
output: {"workflow_name": "Access Request: The Aws Console", "category": "it_access", "trigger": {"event": "A HR business partner requests access to the AWS console", "source_system": "ServiceNow"}, "systems": ["ServiceNow", "Active Directory", "AWS IAM"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Open an access request ticket", "system": "ServiceNow", "required_inputs": ["requester_id", "resource", "justification"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Route to resource owner for approval", "system": "ServiceNow", "required_inputs": ["ticket_id", "owner_id"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Auto-deny after SLA breach"}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Grant scoped, time-bound access", "system": "AWS IAM", "required_inputs": ["user_id", "role", "expiry"], "condition": "Only after approval is recorded", "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Record grant and schedule access review", "system": "Active Directory", "required_inputs": ["user_id", "grant_id"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}], "approval_required": true, "risk_level": "high"}

instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.
input: Process the bi-weekly payroll for Canada covering roughly 300 staff. Aggregate hours and expenses in SAP, calculate net pay, check it against Concur, then disburse and distribute payslips.
output: {"workflow_name": "Bi-Weekly Payroll Run", "category": "payroll", "trigger": {"event": "The bi-weekly pay period closes", "source_system": "SAP"}, "systems": ["SAP", "Concur", "Slack"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Aggregate timesheets and approved expenses", "system": "SAP", "required_inputs": ["pay_period", "employee_ids"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Flag missing timesheets to managers"}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Calculate gross pay, taxes, and deductions", "system": "SAP", "required_inputs": ["pay_period", "tax_tables"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Reconcile totals against the finance ledger", "system": "Concur", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id", "gl_account"], "condition": "Block disbursement if variance exceeds threshold", "fallback": "Hold the run and notify finance"}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Disburse payments and send payslips", "system": "SAP", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id", "bank_file"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 5, "action": "Notify finance that the run is complete", "system": "Slack", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}], "approval_required": true, "risk_level": "high"}

instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.

instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.
input: Process bereavement leave for a financial analyst (15 days). Capture the request, get manager sign-off, update payroll, and announce coverage to the team.
output: {"workflow_name": "Bereavement Leave Request", "category": "leave_management", "trigger": {"event": "A financial analyst requests bereavement leave", "source_system": "Workday"}, "systems": ["Workday", "Slack"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Submit bereavement leave request for review", "system": "Workday", "required_inputs": ["employee_id", "start_date", "end_date"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Route request to direct manager for approval", "system": "Workday", "required_inputs": ["request_id", "manager_id"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Auto-escalate to skip-level after 3 business days"}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Notify payroll and update leave balance", "system": "Workday", "required_inputs": ["request_id", "approved_days"], "condition": "Only after manager approval", "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Inform the team of coverage dates", "system": "Slack", "required_inputs": ["team", "start_date", "end_date"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}], "approval_required": true, "risk_level": "high"}

instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.
input: A DevOps engineer is leaving the company. Handle the termination record, access revocation, asset return, and final payroll.
output: {"workflow_name": "Devops Engineer Offboarding", "category": "offboarding", "trigger": {"event": "A DevOps engineer is terminated or resigns", "source_system": "BambooHR"}, "systems": ["BambooHR", "Microsoft 365", "Jira"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Record the termination and last working day", "system": "BambooHR", "required_inputs": ["employee_id", "last_day", "reason"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Revoke all system access and SSO", "system": "Microsoft 365", "required_inputs": ["employee_id"], "condition": "On last working day", "fallback": "Page security if revocation fails"}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Reclaim assets and close out tickets", "system": "Jira", "required_inputs": ["employee_id", "asset_list"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Run final payroll and benefits settlement", "system": "BambooHR", "required_inputs": ["employee_id", "final_pay"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}], "approval_required": true, "risk_level": "medium"}

instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.
input: A sales director starts next week in IT (the field). Build the workflow to handle their documents, profile creation, account provisioning, and team setup.
output: {"workflow_name": "Sales Director Onboarding", "category": "hr_onboarding", "trigger": {"event": "A new sales director is hired in IT", "source_system": "BambooHR"}, "systems": ["BambooHR", "Microsoft 365", "Slack", "Workday", "Jira"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Collect and verify signed onboarding documents", "system": "Workday", "required_inputs": ["employee_id", "offer_letter"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Escalate to HR if documents are missing"}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Create employee profile and assign manager", "system": "BambooHR", "required_inputs": ["employee_id", "department"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Provision SSO account and email", "system": "Microsoft 365", "required_inputs": ["employee_email", "role"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Open IT ticket if provisioning fails"}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Add new hire to team channels and groups", "system": "Slack", "required_inputs": ["employee_email", "team"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 5, "action": "Assign role-based onboarding training", "system": "Jira", "required_inputs": ["employee_id", "role"], "condition": "Only if role requires compliance training", "fallback": null}], "approval_required": false, "risk_level": "low"}

instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.
input: Set up Jira ticket handling for password reset reports from the People Ops team (submitted via email) covering intake, triage, resolution, and closure notifications.
output: {"workflow_name": "Password Reset Ticket Handling", "category": "ticketing", "trigger": {"event": "A password reset ticket is submitted", "source_system": "Jira"}, "systems": ["Jira", "Microsoft 365"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Intake and classify the ticket", "system": "Jira", "required_inputs": ["reporter_id", "description", "category"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Triage priority and assign an owner", "system": "Jira", "required_inputs": ["ticket_id", "severity"], "condition": "Escalate to on-call if severity is critical", "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Resolve the issue and document the fix", "system": "Jira", "required_inputs": ["ticket_id", "resolution_notes"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Reassign if owner is unavailable past SLA"}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Notify the reporter and close the ticket", "system": "Microsoft 365", "required_inputs": ["ticket_id", "reporter_id"], "condition": "Only after the reporter confirms resolution", "fallback": null}], "approval_required": false, "risk_level": "low"}

instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.
input: When a new customer support agent joins IT at the Berlin office, we need to onboard them: collect their signed paperwork, set up their HR profile, provision their login and email, and add them to the right channels.
output: {"workflow_name": "Customer Support Agent Onboarding", "category": "hr_onboarding", "trigger": {"event": "A new customer support agent is hired in IT", "source_system": "Workday"}, "systems": ["Workday", "Microsoft 365", "Slack", "DocuSign", "ServiceNow"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Collect and verify signed onboarding documents", "system": "DocuSign", "required_inputs": ["employee_id", "offer_letter"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Escalate to HR if documents are missing"}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Create employee profile and assign manager", "system": "Workday", "required_inputs": ["employee_id", "department"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Provision SSO account and email", "system": "Microsoft 365", "required_inputs": ["employee_email", "role"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Open IT ticket if provisioning fails"}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Add new hire to team channels and groups", "system": "Slack", "required_inputs": ["employee_email", "team"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 5, "action": "Assign role-based onboarding training", "system": "ServiceNow", "required_inputs": ["employee_id", "role"], "condition": "Only if role requires compliance training", "fallback": null}], "approval_required": true, "risk_level": "low"}

instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.
input: A software engineer needs access to the source code repository. They raise a request, the owner approves it, access is granted with an expiry, and we log it for review.
output: {"workflow_name": "Access Request: The Source Code Repository", "category": "it_access", "trigger": {"event": "A software engineer requests access to the source code repository", "source_system": "Jira"}, "systems": ["Jira", "Active Directory", "Okta"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Open an access request ticket", "system": "Jira", "required_inputs": ["requester_id", "resource", "justification"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Route to resource owner for approval", "system": "Jira", "required_inputs": ["ticket_id", "owner_id"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Auto-deny after SLA breach"}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Grant scoped, time-bound access", "system": "Okta", "required_inputs": ["user_id", "role", "expiry"], "condition": "Only after approval is recorded", "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Record grant and schedule access review", "system": "Active Directory", "required_inputs": ["user_id", "grant_id"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}], "approval_required": true, "risk_level": "medium"}

instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.
input: We're hiring a software engineer in Supply Chain. Build the workflow from application screening through interview scheduling, feedback, and offer.
output: {"workflow_name": "Software Engineer Recruiting Pipeline", "category": "recruiting", "trigger": {"event": "A software engineer requisition opens in Supply Chain", "source_system": "Lever"}, "systems": ["Lever", "Microsoft 365", "Slack", "Workday"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Screen new applications against the rubric", "system": "Lever", "required_inputs": ["job_id", "applications"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Auto-reject clear non-matches with a polite email"}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Schedule interview loop with the panel", "system": "Microsoft 365", "required_inputs": ["candidate_id", "panel_ids"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Collect structured feedback and decide", "system": "Lever", "required_inputs": ["candidate_id", "scorecards"], "condition": "Advance only if average score clears the bar", "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Generate and send the offer", "system": "Workday", "required_inputs": ["candidate_id", "compensation"], "condition": "Only after approval", "fallback": null}], "approval_required": true, "risk_level": "medium"}

instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.
input: At a global consultancy, when a software bug comes in via email for the Supply Chain team on ServiceNow: intake and classify it, triage priority, resolve it, and confirm with the reporter on Microsoft 365 before closing.
output: {"workflow_name": "Software Bug Ticket Handling", "category": "ticketing", "trigger": {"event": "A software bug ticket is submitted", "source_system": "ServiceNow"}, "systems": ["ServiceNow", "Microsoft 365"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Intake and classify the ticket", "system": "ServiceNow", "required_inputs": ["reporter_id", "description", "category"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Triage priority and assign an owner", "system": "ServiceNow", "required_inputs": ["ticket_id", "severity"], "condition": "Escalate to on-call if severity is critical", "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Resolve the issue and document the fix", "system": "ServiceNow", "required_inputs": ["ticket_id", "resolution_notes"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Reassign if owner is unavailable past SLA"}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Notify the reporter and close the ticket", "system": "Microsoft 365", "required_inputs": ["ticket_id", "reporter_id"], "condition": "Only after the reporter confirms resolution", "fallback": null}], "approval_required": false, "risk_level": "low"}

instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.
input: Run a SOC 2 control review at a logistics company this Q4, focused on the full control set, from kickoff through evidence gathering, gap remediation, and attestation.
output: {"workflow_name": "SOC 2 Control Review", "category": "compliance", "trigger": {"event": "The SOC 2 review cycle begins", "source_system": "ServiceNow"}, "systems": ["ServiceNow", "Google Workspace"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Open the periodic SOC 2 review", "system": "ServiceNow", "required_inputs": ["control_set", "review_period"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Collect evidence from control owners", "system": "ServiceNow", "required_inputs": ["control_ids", "owner_ids"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Send reminders and escalate overdue items"}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Review evidence and flag gaps", "system": "ServiceNow", "required_inputs": ["evidence_ids"], "condition": "Create remediation tasks for any failing control", "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Archive the signed attestation", "system": "Google Workspace", "required_inputs": ["report_id", "approver_id"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}], "approval_required": true, "risk_level": "high"}

instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.
input: Recruit a software engineer for Operations: screen applicants, schedule interviews, gather feedback, and send an offer to the chosen candidate.
output: {"workflow_name": "Software Engineer Recruiting Pipeline", "category": "recruiting", "trigger": {"event": "A software engineer requisition opens in Operations", "source_system": "Lever"}, "systems": ["Lever", "Microsoft 365", "Slack", "DocuSign"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Screen new applications against the rubric", "system": "Lever", "required_inputs": ["job_id", "applications"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Auto-reject clear non-matches with a polite email"}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Schedule interview loop with the panel", "system": "Microsoft 365", "required_inputs": ["candidate_id", "panel_ids"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Collect structured feedback and decide", "system": "Lever", "required_inputs": ["candidate_id", "scorecards"], "condition": "Advance only if average score clears the bar", "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Generate and send the offer", "system": "DocuSign", "required_inputs": ["candidate_id", "compensation"], "condition": "Only after approval", "fallback": null}], "approval_required": true, "risk_level": "medium"}

instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.
input: Grant a HR business partner access to the finance system: ticket it, get owner approval, provision scoped access, and schedule a periodic review.
output: {"workflow_name": "Access Request: The Finance System", "category": "it_access", "trigger": {"event": "A HR business partner requests access to the finance system", "source_system": "ServiceNow"}, "systems": ["ServiceNow", "Active Directory", "Okta"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Open an access request ticket", "system": "ServiceNow", "required_inputs": ["requester_id", "resource", "justification"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Route to resource owner for approval", "system": "ServiceNow", "required_inputs": ["ticket_id", "owner_id"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Auto-deny after SLA breach"}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Grant scoped, time-bound access", "system": "Okta", "required_inputs": ["user_id", "role", "expiry"], "condition": "Only after approval is recorded", "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Record grant and schedule access review", "system": "Active Directory", "required_inputs": ["user_id", "grant_id"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}], "approval_required": true, "risk_level": "high"}

instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.
input: At a healthcare provider we run bi-weekly payroll for Canada (a few thousand employees) on Workday: pull timesheets and expenses, compute pay and deductions, reconcile against the ledger in SAP, pay everyone, and send payslips.
output: {"workflow_name": "Bi-Weekly Payroll Run", "category": "payroll", "trigger": {"event": "The bi-weekly pay period closes", "source_system": "Workday"}, "systems": ["Workday", "SAP", "Microsoft 365"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Aggregate timesheets and approved expenses", "system": "Workday", "required_inputs": ["pay_period", "employee_ids"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Flag missing timesheets to managers"}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Calculate gross pay, taxes, and deductions", "system": "Workday", "required_inputs": ["pay_period", "tax_tables"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Reconcile totals against the finance ledger", "system": "SAP", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id", "gl_account"], "condition": "Block disbursement if variance exceeds threshold", "fallback": "Hold the run and notify finance"}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Disburse payments and send payslips", "system": "Workday", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id", "bank_file"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 5, "action": "Notify finance that the run is complete", "system": "Microsoft 365", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}], "approval_required": true, "risk_level": "high"}

instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.
input: our regional bank needs a bi-weekly payroll workflow for the EU: timesheet aggregation, pay calculation, ledger reconciliation in SAP, disbursement of a few thousand payments, and a completion notice.
output: {"workflow_name": "Bi-Weekly Payroll Run", "category": "payroll", "trigger": {"event": "The bi-weekly pay period closes", "source_system": "SAP"}, "systems": ["SAP", "Google Workspace"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Aggregate timesheets and approved expenses", "system": "SAP", "required_inputs": ["pay_period", "employee_ids"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Flag missing timesheets to managers"}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Calculate gross pay, taxes, and deductions", "system": "SAP", "required_inputs": ["pay_period", "tax_tables"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Reconcile totals against the finance ledger", "system": "SAP", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id", "gl_account"], "condition": "Block disbursement if variance exceeds threshold", "fallback": "Hold the run and notify finance"}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Disburse payments and send payslips", "system": "SAP", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id", "bank_file"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 5, "action": "Notify finance that the run is complete", "system": "Google Workspace", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}], "approval_required": true, "risk_level": "high"}
